mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN tutor_availability ta ON b.availability_id = ta.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND ta.start_at >= NOW() AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND b.done_at IS NULL) AS upcomingLessons, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking b WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND b.done_at IS NOT NULL) AS completedLessons, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId}) AS totalReviews, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(p.amount) FROM payment p JOIN booking b ON p.booking_id = b.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PAID'), 0) AS totalSpent

SELECT b.id AS bookingId, l.id AS lessonId, l.user_id AS tutorId, tp.id AS tutorProfileId, u.name AS tutorName, l.title AS subject, ta.start_at AS startAt, ta.end_at AS endAt, CASE WHEN b.canceled_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN b.done_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN b.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'CONFIRMED' ELSE 'PENDING' END AS status, (l.price * GREATEST(1, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ta.start_at, ta.end_at) / 30)) AS price, COALESCE(b.paid_at, p.paid_at) AS paidAt, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(b.zoom_join_url), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(tp.default_zoom_url), '') ) AS zoomJoinUrl FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN tutor_availability ta ON b.availability_id = ta.id JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id JOIN tutor_profile tp ON l.user_id = tp.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT booking_id, MAX(paid_at) AS paid_at FROM payment WHERE status = 'PAID' GROUP BY booking_id ) p ON p.booking_id = b.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND ta.start_at >= NOW() AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND b.done_at IS NULL ORDER BY ta.start_at ASC

SELECT b.id AS bookingId, l.id AS lessonId, l.user_id AS tutorId, tp.id AS tutorProfileId, u.name AS tutorName, l.title AS subject, ta.start_at AS startAt, ta.end_at AS endAt, CASE WHEN b.canceled_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN b.done_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN b.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'CONFIRMED' ELSE 'PENDING' END AS status, (l.price * GREATEST(1, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ta.start_at, ta.end_at) / 30)) AS price, COALESCE(b.paid_at, p.paid_at) AS paidAt, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(b.zoom_join_url), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(tp.default_zoom_url), '') ) AS zoomJoinUrl, r.id AS reviewId FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN tutor_availability ta ON b.availability_id = ta.id JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id JOIN tutor_profile tp ON l.user_id = tp.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT booking_id, MAX(paid_at) AS paid_at FROM payment WHERE status = 'PAID' GROUP BY booking_id ) p ON p.booking_id = b.id LEFT JOIN review r ON r.booking_id = b.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND (ta.start_at < NOW() OR b.done_at IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY ta.start_at DESC

SELECT r.id AS reviewId, l.user_id AS tutorId, tp.id AS tutorProfileId, u.name AS tutorName, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM review r JOIN booking b ON r.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id JOIN tutor_profile tp ON l.user_id = tp.user_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT x.id, x.bookingId, x.tutorId, x.tutorName, x.subject, x.studentId, x.senderRole, x.content, x.createdAt FROM ( SELECT tm.id, tm.booking_id AS bookingId, tm.tutor_id AS tutorId, u.name AS tutorName, l.title AS subject, tm.student_id AS studentId, tm.sender_role AS senderRole, tm.content, tm.created_at AS createdAt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY tm.tutor_id ORDER BY tm.created_at DESC, tm.id DESC ) AS rn FROM tutor_message tm LEFT JOIN booking b ON tm.booking_id = b.id LEFT JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN users u ON tm.tutor_id = u.id WHERE tm.student_id = #{userId} AND tm.sender_role = 'TUTOR' ) x WHERE x.rn = 1 ORDER BY x.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20
